## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer check` passes (php-cs-fixer, phpstan level max, phpunit).
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by a test that renders and asserts a valid PDF.
- [ ] Public API changes are noted in `CHANGELOG.md` (and flagged if backward-incompatible).
- [ ] Docblocks / README updated where relevant.
